# Specific Plan Template

Use this template for a feature, module, workflow, integration, or bounded change derived from a Master Plan.

## Objective

State the specific outcome this plan prepares. Connect it to the Master Plan objective or decision that authorizes the work.

## Scope

Define the exact work included in this specific plan. Mention affected modules, documents, workflows, or planning objects.

## Non-Scope

State what this plan intentionally does not cover. Include adjacent work that may look related but belongs to another plan or phase.

## Research

Summarize the research used to support the plan. Include sources, confidence, key findings, and how each finding affects planning.

## Alternatives

Describe realistic alternatives considered. Explain their benefits, costs, risks, and reasons they were not selected.

## Decision Taken

Record the chosen direction. Link or reference the relevant decision record when one exists.

## Structure

Describe the planned structure of the work: modules, documents, interfaces, data flow, workflows, or responsibility boundaries.

## Validations

List the checks that prove the plan is ready for implementation and later prove implementation followed the plan.

## Risks

Identify risks specific to this workstream and describe mitigation strategies.

## Dependencies

List dependencies on decisions, research, other phases, external systems, people, or prior implementation work.

## Tasks

List the implementation-ready tasks derived from the plan. Each task should have objective, context, restrictions, steps, validations, and expected result.

## Impact

Describe how this plan affects the project: architecture, tasks, documentation, validation, user experience, operational behavior, and future planning.
